problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: If Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor is applied to essential, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
